steps.title: Identify the glacier result
steps.content: The sentence explains that glaciers bore down on Earth's crust and then left a fjord carved into the landscape. The transition must show that the fjord was a result of the glaciers' movement and pressure.

steps.title: Choose a result transition
steps.content: A signals a general statement, B signals an example, and D signals contrast. None fits a cause-and-effect relationship between glacial pressure and fjord formation. The answer is C.
